Two Dw bots in one day! The last one already has 200 chats so I'd thought I'd feed the community a little more Rodger, thinking of making a Sprout or Vee bot, make sure to leave a request in the comments if you have one!

Btw idk who made the art sorry рҹҳӯрҹҳӯрҹҳӯ
